# Shopinvader Product Link

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:eadeee29a1d51cd788e7bfa4ec34d4dbf2e30713f138f9116872e7455b15bedb
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }}

Integrate `product_template_multi_link` into Shopinvader.
This module takes care of computing product links data
for search engine product indexes.
Index data is computed as a mapping of variants by link type.
The link list only contains links to product linked through a
symmetric link type or product on the left side of a non-symmetric
link type. In a asymmetric link type, we take as assumption that
that the left side of the relation is the product to promote, the one
with the added value.

methods.name: odoo.addons.shopinvader_search_engine_product_template_multi_link.models.product_product.ProductProduct._compute_shopinvader_product_links
documentation:
Compute the shopinvader product links.

The result is a dictionary where key is tuple of (LinkPosition,link type id) and
value is a set of variant ids linked to the product. Only active links
are returned if target variants are also into the same search engine index.

methods.name: odoo.addons.shopinvader_search_engine_product_template_multi_link.models.product_product.ProductProduct._get_target
documentation:
Return the target main variant of the current product for the link.

```
param link

product template link

return

tuple(LinkPosition, ProductProduct) The position of the current
product in the link and the target variant. The position is important
because it allows to know to interpret the link according to its type.
```

methods.name: odoo.addons.shopinvader_search_engine_product_template_multi_link.models.product_product.ProductProduct._get_main_product_bound
documentation: Return the main bound product of the current product

classes.name: odoo.addons.shopinvader_search_engine_product_template_multi_link.schemas.product_link.ProductLink
documentation: Information related to a product linked to the current product

methods.name: odoo.addons.shopinvader_search_engine_product_template_multi_link.schemas.product_product.ProductProduct._compute_links
documentation:
We add a link info for symmetrical link or the left part of
asymmetrical link. This is done on purpose since we take as granted
that the right part of asymmetrical link means that we don't want to
promote the left part as the left part is less important than the right part.

methods.name: odoo.addons.shopinvader_search_engine_product_template_multi_link.schemas.product_product.ProductProduct._normalize_product_link_code
documentation: Normalize link code, default to `generic` when missing.
